title: RBI Foreign Exchange Management (Authorised Persons) Regulations, 2026 - Amendment to Money Changing and Remittance Activities
description: RBI issued amendments to Master Directions on Money Changing Activities and Other Remittance Facilities following the notification of Foreign Exchange Management (Authorised Persons) Regulations, 2026 (FEMA 401/2026-RB). A.P. (DIR Series) Circulars were superseded with updated instructions.
